title: calonema ultimum
intro: Calonema ultimum, also known as Indian gentian, is a plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calonema ultimum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine practices.
